title: Record information about Country
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Record information about Country demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Collect information

pcs.text: Confirm boundaries and extent of Country with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm boundaries and extent of Country with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm boundaries and extent of Country with supervisor.

pcs.text: Recognise and record plant and animal species by Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander or common name
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and record plant and animal species by Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander or common name?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and record plant and animal species by Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander or common name.

pcs.text: Identify and record special features and sites of Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record special features and sites of Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record special features and sites of Country.

pcs.text: Confirm relationships of plants and animals, and simple food chains, from Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural perspectives with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm relationships of plants and animals, and simple food chains, from Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural perspectives with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm relationships of plants and animals, and simple food chains, from Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural perspectives with supervisor.

pcs.text: Collect information on relevant land management practices for Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect information on relevant land management practices for Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect information on relevant land management practices for Country.

pcs.text: Determine local community history through available literature and other media according to instruction
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine local community history through available literature and other media according to instruction?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine local community history through available literature and other media according to instruction.

pcs.text: Follow work health and safety policies and procedures when collecting information on Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow work health and safety policies and procedures when collecting information on Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow work health and safety policies and procedures when collecting information on Country.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Collect information

elements.title: Review environmental changes

pcs.text: Identify environmental changes and the impacts on plant and animal communities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental changes and the impacts on plant and animal communities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental changes and the impacts on plant and animal communities.

pcs.text: Document environmental trends and the impacts to Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document environmental trends and the impacts to Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document environmental trends and the impacts to Country.

pcs.text: Record cultural management practices that address environmental change
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record cultural management practices that address environmental change?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record cultural management practices that address environmental change.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Review environmental changes

elements.title: Document information

pcs.text: Record historical and cultural information about Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record historical and cultural information about Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record historical and cultural information about Country.

pcs.text: Provide access to information to those who are authorised according to Community guidelines and protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide access to information to those who are authorised according to Community guidelines and protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide access to information to those who are authorised according to Community guidelines and protocols.

pcs.text: Recognise and record ownership of information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and record ownership of information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and record ownership of information.

pcs.text: Document conditions and parameters for using information according to cultural protocols and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document conditions and parameters for using information according to cultural protocols and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document conditions and parameters for using information according to cultural protocols and supervisor instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Document information
